title: ceratophyllum demersum
intro: Ceratophyllum demersum, also known as hornwort, is a free-floating aquatic plant that grows in freshwater environments, such as ponds, lakes, and rivers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Ceratophyllum demersum is traditionally prepared as a tea or infused in water to extract its medicinal properties, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with other medications.
